title: Log Groups should be configured with a retention policy
description: Inadequately configured "Log Groups" can lead to indefinite storage of log streams on AWS, resulting in potential cost implications and non-compliance with data retention policies. It’s crucial to set the appropriate retention policy for AWS::Logs::LogGroup by defining the RetentionInDays property with a valid value. What is the potential impact? Properly managing log data is essential for effective system monitoring, troubleshooting, and security auditing.
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

noncompliant:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Resources:
  AppLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /aws/lambda/myfunction  # Non-compliant: no retention policy
compliant:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Resources:
  AppLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: /aws/lambda/myfunction
      RetentionInDays: 30  # Compliant: retention policy set

property_checks.message: Log Group should be configured with a retention policy
